description_long: This is an adult human figure with a bald head, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The figure is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve top and knee-length shorts, both of which are form-fitting and lack any visible accessories or patterns. The body proportions are realistic, with defined limbs and a natural stance. The hands are open and fingers are slightly spread, while the feet are bare and positioned flat on the ground. The overall appearance is simple and stylized, with smooth surfaces and minimal anatomical detail. The figure is suitable for representing a generic pedestrian in urban environments.
description: A bald adult figure in a fitted short-sleeve top and knee-length shorts, standing upright with arms outstretched. The design is simple, smooth, and stylized, with bare feet and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, facial features, fitted top, shorts, and outstretched arms with open hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, chest, arm, and leg, showing the figure's upright posture and bare feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, arms, and legs, with the clothing's fit and lack of accessories visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, torso, arm, and leg, emphasizing the figure's stance.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve fitted top and knee-length shorts
